name: plumbing-geyser-leak
description: Water is dripping from my geyser in the roof. Not sure if it started today or has been going on a while.

hypotheses.label: Loose union fitting
evidence_for: Drip pattern suggests pipe joint area
evidence_against: Drip appears central not at pipe ends

hypotheses.label: Ruptured tank
evidence_against: Volume of water is small — tank rupture usually floods

mockAgentOutput.what_we_dont_know: We cannot tell from the description whether the water is dripping from the top valve area, the side seam, or a pipe joint.
mockAgentOutput.why_it_matters: The location of the leak tells us which component has failed and how urgently it needs attention.

chips.text: Water drips from the top valve area.
Water drips from a pipe connection.
Water is running down the side of the tank.

expected.must_ask_about: location of the leak on the geyser
